title: MOSTFUN 4 Pack 3 in 1 Multifunctional Cup Lid and Bottle Crevice Cleaning Brushes, Essential Cleaning Tools for Home Kitchen Portable and Versatile Cleaning Brushes Ideal for Water Bottles and Cups
features: 【 Efficiently Clean Every Corner】: Our multifunctional cup lid brush is designed to effectively clean the crevices and grooves of cup mouths, removing stubborn stains and dirt that regular brushes may miss.

【Versatile 3-in-1 Design】: Cleaning brush can rotate 360 ° in one direction,with three different brush heads ,include a silicone cup brush, a sealing brush, and a hard bristle corner brush,our brush offers comprehensive cleaning capabilities for different areas and surfaces.
【Durable and Easy to Use】: Made from sturdy ABS material, our cup lid brush is built to withstand frequent use and is easy to grip and maneuver, making cleaning a breeze.
【Convenient Storage Solution】: The brush features a hanging hole for easy storage and quick drying. It can be hung up after use, saving space and promoting cleanliness and hygiene.

【Wide Applications】: Suitable for various cups, including water cups, glasses, feeding bottles, and more, our brush is a versatile cleaning tool. It can also be used for water bottles, pacifiers, and other items, making it a practical choice for everyday cleaning needs.
description: Features: U-shaped Design: U-shaped silicone cup brush for cleaning stubborn stains around the cup cavity. The soft and dense U-shaped silicone cup brush can be used for stable operation. New Design: The cup brush comes with a hanging hole for easy draining after cleaning. It doesn't take up space and is resistant to bacterial growth. The design is novel and of high value. 3-in-1 Cleaning Brush: Small and versatile nozzle cleaning brush for cleaning corners and stubborn stains hidden inside the cup lid. Specifications: Material: ABS+PP Size: 11.4 × 3.4 × 1.6cm / 4.4 × 1.3 × 0.6 inches Colors: Green, Blue, Red Quantity: 4pcs Package Includes: 3 × 3-in-1 cleaning brush 1 × straw brush
